text.title: Three loading levels of a Claude Skill
text.summary: A Skill is a pyramid: frontmatter is always loaded, SKILL.md loads on activation, bundled files load only on explicit Read.

section.title: Level 1 — frontmatter (always loaded)
section.p: YAML frontmatter is the only part of a skill that always lives in the system prompt. Keep it tiny — Claude scans every skill's frontmatter on every request to decide what to activate.

rule.statement: Frontmatter must contain at minimum name, description, and trigger keywords; the description must be under 30 lines and front-load specific verbs and nouns the user would say.
rule.rationale: Anthropic's skill-router matches the user message against the description text; vague descriptions ("helps with stuff") trigger nothing and inflate base context for zero value.

example.code: --- name: faion-deploy description: Use when user asks to deploy a faion-net project (faion.net, dev.faion.net, api.faion.net, neromedia, pashtelka, longlife, ender). Handles op_unlock, deploy-gh.sh selection, post-deploy verification, telegram notification. ---
example.note: Description names every domain a user might mention, plus the steps it covers.

example.code: --- name: deployer description: A skill that helps with deployment. ---
example.note: No domain triggers, no steps, no project hints — router has nothing to match.

section.title: Level 2 — SKILL.md body (loaded on activation)
section.p: SKILL.md is loaded into the conversation only when Claude decides the skill applies. Keep it focused on procedure and decisions, defer everything else.

rule.statement: SKILL.md body must stay under 500 lines and must reference scripts, examples, and long reference docs by relative path rather than inlining their content.
rule.rationale: Activated body sits in context for the rest of the turn; inlining 2000-line reference docs costs that token tax even when the agent only needed 50 lines of it.

section.title: Level 3 — bundled files (loaded only on Read)
section.p: Anything in scripts/, references/, or assets/ loads only when SKILL.md tells Claude to Read it.

rule.statement: Place every artifact larger than ~80 lines (long runbooks, schemas, code samples) in a sibling folder and reference it from SKILL.md by relative path.
rule.rationale: Files are loaded lazily on Read — a 5000-line runbook in references/ costs zero context until the procedure actually needs it.

antipattern.description: Pasting an entire reference document inline as a fenced code block in SKILL.md.
antipattern.reason: Defeats progressive disclosure — the reference now loads on every activation, even for sub-tasks that never touch it.

section.reference: Complete Guide to Building Skills for Claude (PDF).
